title: Souffle Au Fromage (Cheese Souffle)
ingredients: 4 egg whites, beaten stiff, room temperature
instructions: Stir in the flour with a wooden spoon.
Add the milk gradually and stir until smooth and thick.
Add the egg yolks one by one, beating hard after each addition.
Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
Pour the mixture into the prepared souffle dish, filling it only ¾ full.
Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes.
Increase oven heat to 450 degrees F and bake for 10 more minutes.
notes: All ingredients should be at room temperature for best results
Fill the mold only ¾ full to allow the souffle to rise properly
Serve immediately after baking for optimal height and texture
